professor.biography_text: Ph.D. in Beijing Institute of Technology, 2003. M.S. in Zhejiang University 1989. B.S. in Zhejiang University 1986. September 2003-Now: Beijing Institute of Technology. Senior Engineer of Software School. November 2012-November 2013: Scholar Researcher in University of Texas in Dallas October 2005-March 2006: Tokyo University of Technology. Research Specialist. November 1996-November 1997: Fujitsu Shitsuoka Lab. Research Staff.
